mapper.insert: insert into seckill_order (user_id, coupon_id, order_number, status, create_time, pay_time) values (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{orderNumber}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{payTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, coupon_id as couponId, order_number as orderNumber, status, create_time as createTime, pay_time as payTime from seckill_order where id = #{id}
select id, user_id as userId, coupon_id as couponId, order_number as orderNumber, status, create_time as createTime, pay_time as payTime from seckill_order where order_number = #{orderNumber}

select id, user_id as userId, coupon_id as couponId, order_number as orderNumber, status, create_time as createTime, pay_time as payTime from seckill_order where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc

select id, user_id as userId, coupon_id as couponId, order_number as orderNumber, status, create_time as createTime, pay_time as payTime from seckill_order where user_id = #{userId} and coupon_id = #{couponId}
mapper.update: update seckill_order set pay_time = #{payTime}, status = status + 1 where order_number = #{orderNumber} and status < 6
mapper.select: select count(*) from seckill_order where status = #{status}
select sum(sc.seckill_price) from seckill_order so join seckill_coupon sc on so.coupon_id = sc.id where so.status = 2
select sum(sc.seckill_price) from seckill_order so join seckill_coupon sc on so.coupon_id = sc.id where so.status = 2 and date(so.pay_time) = curdate()
